title: anaphalis gracilis var. ulophylla
intro: Anaphalis gracilis var. ulophylla, also known as pearly everlasting, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Anaphalis gracilis var. ulophylla can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
